provenance.name: Who needs to know or act?
Which channel and time are appropriate?
Notifications User preferences and quiet hours API
Read User preferences and quiet hours
Manage User preferences and quiet hours
User preferences and quiet hours Workspace
The module owns all platform notifications Automation
The module owns all platform notifications

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Every notification names the triggering event and intended action.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Mandatory security and approval notices cannot be disabled.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Preferences and quiet hours are evaluated before optional delivery.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Duplicate source events create one user-visible effect.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Template versions are immutable after publication.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Retries are bounded and terminal failure has an owner.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Sensitive content is minimized by channel.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Status is derived from per-channel delivery evidence.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.
